title: stelis prolata
intro: Stelis prolata, also known as the "Yellow Bird Orchid", is a species of orchid native to Central America, characterized by its yellow or greenish-yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to exhibit potential in treating various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis prolata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and promote easy breathing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
